# Repository Instructions

- Write all new documentation and AI customization files in English.
- This rule applies to README updates, Markdown documentation, skills, prompts, instructions, and similar repository-facing documents.
- Only use another language when the task explicitly requires editing an existing locale-specific translation file.
- For UI work, actionable buttons must have visible backgrounds. Avoid ghost, flat, or text-only buttons unless the user explicitly requests that style or the control is disabled/non-actionable.
